prompt: A cute anthropomorphic cat-girl with white fur, {argument name="hair color" default="short green hair"}, a prominent ahoge, and large {argument name="eye color" default="green"} anime eyes. She has fluffy green cat ears and a long white tail. She is wearing a loose, oversized {argument name="outfit" default="green off-the-shoulder tunic"} and sitting peacefully on the ground with her legs tucked to the side and paws resting gently in front of her. The setting is a lush {argument name="setting" default="alpine meadow filled with small white and yellow wildflowers"}. In the background, there is a sweeping valley, pine forests, and majestic snow-capped mountains under a bright blue sky with fluffy clouds. The art style blends an anime character design with a highly realistic, {argument name="style" default="photographic landscape"} featuring bright, natural sunlight.
translatedPrompt: 一只可爱的拟人化猫娘，拥有白色皮毛、{argument name="hair color" default="短绿发"}、显眼的呆毛，以及一双硕大的 {argument name="eye color" default="绿色"} 动漫眼睛。她长着毛茸茸的绿色猫耳和一条长长的白色尾巴。她穿着一件宽松的 {argument name="outfit" default="绿色露肩长袍"}，安静地坐在地上，双腿侧向蜷缩，爪子轻轻地放在身前。背景是一片郁郁葱葱的 {argument name="setting" default="开满白色和黄色小野花的阿尔卑斯草甸"}。远景处是广阔的山谷、松树林和雄伟的雪山，头顶是蓝天白云。艺术风格将动漫角色设计与高度写实的 {argument name="style" default="摄影级景观"} 相结合，呈现出明亮、自然的阳光感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 阿尔卑斯草甸中的写实风动漫猫娘：生成一张 2.5D 插画，描绘一个拟人化的动漫角色坐在一片细节丰富、照片级逼真的自然景观中。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
